title: Market-Gap Safety Cleanup
goal: Harden normalized league-rank and ADP context so partial market data cannot look like a normal edge.
constraints: Review-only; no market data into private value; no active ranking mutation

title: Decision Board UX Cleanup
goal: Reduce Decision Board clutter and keep Top-Five Rule plus key review areas easy to read.
constraints: No final cut/keep/trade/draft recommendations; warnings/receipts stay available

title: Player Board Human-Readable Formula Table
goal: Make the Player Board the large understandable formula table with audit-watch notes.
constraints: No formula changes; market columns remain context only

title: TE No-Premium Interpretation Pass
goal: Make TE no-premium caps and TE manual review easier to see.
constraints: Do not add TE premium logic; do not hand-tune TE scores

title: Aging And Rushing-Age Manual Review Pass
goal: Surface RB age-cliff and QB rushing-age manual review warnings where decisions happen.
constraints: Do not fabricate DOB or injury data

title: Route Target Snap Data Gap Plan
goal: Plan admitted route/target/snap source upgrades without fake route metrics.
constraints: No estimated route metrics labeled as real

title: Final Human Review Readiness Check
goal: Run local checks and summarize what the user should review first.
constraints: No app promotion; no readiness unlock
